34258032.fa: a fellowship-trained musculoskeletal interventional radiologist in London, United Kingdom. He is a founding member of the European Society of Musculoskeletal Radiologists 'Young club' and has authored more than 60 original peer-reviewed articles and 15 book chapters. His research and practice focus on novel advanced imaging techniques and interventions for musculoskeletal, sports and oncological conditions
34258032.la: a musculoskeletal radiologist in Warsaw, Poland. He is the associate editor for the musculoskeletal section of the Journal of Ultrasonography and member of the organising committee for the European Society of Musculoskeletal Radiologists 2021 Krakow meeting. His research and practice are dedicated to musculoskeletal, sports and rheumatological imaging
